title: Cross-Document View Transitions: Scaling Across Hundreds of Elements
summary:
Every view-transition-name on a page must be unique. The problem is that every pseudo-element selector in your CSS targets a specific name, so your animation styles explode into an unmanageable wall of selectors.

title: Advanced Tree Counting: Mathematical Layouts With `sibling-index()` And `sibling-count()`
summary: Meet `sibling-index()` and `sibling-count()`. Staggered cascade effect in one line of CSS without `:nth-child()` rules or JS workarounds. Works for 5 items or 5,000.
